CustomField.label: Run When Formula Is True
CustomField.description: A Salesforce formula returning true or false. True means this check applies and runs; false means it is Skipped. Required when "Run This Check When" is "Only when a formula is true".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Salesforce formula returning true/false, e.g. ISPICKVAL(Type, "Partner"). True = run the check. False = Skipped.
